description: You are a graphic designer conducting a visual audit. Visit https://github.com and https://www.python.org to extract the exact color palettes (hex codes) and typography details (font families, sizes) used for key elements like headers, buttons, and body text. Create a structured brand audit report saved to /home/ga/Desktop/brand_audit.txt. The report must have separate sections for each site and list at least 3 distinct hex color codes, the primary font stack/family, and font sizes for headers and body text for each site.
